political.s: FEC: $509K in executive political donations; partisan lean Republican +26 across 14 executive donors.

charity.s: $25M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.01% of revenue).

environment.s: Via parent company Stellantis North America: air pollution violation: $1.3B in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

wiki.keyPeople: American Bantam, Willys, Ford Motor Company
wiki.extract: Jeep is an American automobile brand, now owned by multi-national corporation Stellantis. Jeep has been part of Chrysler since 1987, when Chrysler acquired the Jeep brand, along with other assets, from its previous owner, American Motors Corporation (AMC).

sampleRecords.employer: 4 Wheel Parts   Off Road Truck & Jeep 4x4 Parts
sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was unloading a truck at the loading dock. The employee lost consciousness after the truck pulled away and fell off the loading dock to the concrete below, resulting in an arm fracture.
